action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the initial map of intersection IDs and global simulation parameters from the environment.

action_set_definitions.name: get_network_topology
action_set_definitions.description: Determines the spatial relationship between intersections to identify which is the 'feeder' (upstream) and which is the 'bottleneck' (downstream) for a specific flow direction.

direction.description: The arterial flow direction being analyzed.

action_set_definitions.name: get_lane_queues
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves current queue lengths for all cardinal directions at a specific intersection.

intersection_id.description: The ID of the intersection to query.

action_set_definitions.name: set_signal_phase
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the traffic signal phase for a specific intersection. NS_GREEN allows North-South flow; NS_RED stops North-South flow (typically allowing East-West flow).

intersection_id.description: The ID of the intersection to update.

action_set_definitions.name: step_simulation
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the simulation by a fixed duration to observe the results of applied actions.

seconds.description: The number of simulation seconds to advance.

state_description.intersections: A map of intersection IDs to their current operational status.
state_description.simulation_step: The current discrete time step of the simulation.
